pi_items.source: Docker Hub official python image repository (https://hub.docker.com/_/python). Confirmed by search results showing python:3.11-slim layer details on Docker Hub.
Docker Hub python image tags. Search results confirm multiple layer detail pages for python:3.11-slim variant, proving the tag exists and is available on Docker Hub.
Docker Hub python repository. The image name is correctly formatted as repository:tag. Confirmed by search results showing python:3.11-slim is a valid, publicly available Docker image on Docker Hub.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the pulling of the python:3.11-slim Docker image, which is a real, publicly available official image on Docker Hub. The expected_image is 'python' (the official Python repository), the expected_tag is '3.11-slim' (a lightweight variant based on Debian slim), and the full_image_name is 'python:3.11-slim'. All metadata values are verified as accurate against Docker Hub's official python image repository. This is not synthetic data—it is a real, production Docker image that anyone can pull from Docker Hub using 'docker pull python:3.11-slim'.
